Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All results are within normal limits except for mildly elevated HbA1c (5.8%), indicating prediabetes, and a high platelet distribution width, which may suggest increased platelet size variability but is nonspecific. Other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, lipid profile, and blood counts, are unremarkable. Recommend monitoring glucose metabolism and clinical correlation for platelet findings.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
